display.purpose: Main section titles and welcome greeting.

body.purpose: Standard instructions, copy, and patient list details.

shadows.name: card-shadow
shadows.purpose: Adds soft depth to white cards.

motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: State changes for buttons and inputs.

narrative.overview: A design system that adapts the clean visual hierarchy, generous spacing, and rich card aesthetics of high-end fintech applications to the precise world of laboratory diagnostics. It rejects the dense, intimidating spreadsheets of legacy clinical portals in favor of a clear, task-oriented layout.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering for structural depth (pure white cards over subtle gray backgrounds).
Generous card rounded corners (16px) that soften the clinical experience.
Color as state, not decoration. Teal and Emerald denote health, system status, and progress.
High contrast, legible typography optimized for rapid scanning under fluorescent lab lighting.

rules.name: The Restrained Status Rule
rules.body: The primary accent colors (Teal/Emerald) are reserved strictly for active elements and normal diagnostic bounds. Background decoration using accents is prohibited.

rules.name: The Layering Over Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth must first be established by placing white cards (#ffffff) over light gray backgrounds (#f8fafc). Drop shadows are supplementary and must never exceed a 5% opacity threshold in light mode.

dos: Do place white cards on slate wash backgrounds to ensure visual separation.
Do use uppercase label styles exclusively for system tags and stats eyebrows.
Do ensure all form inputs have a clear hover and focus border transition.
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent on alert cards.
Don't use gradient text for headings.
Don't pair competing font families; stick to the Geist system stack.
Don't use modals as a default action when inline card transitions can handle the task.
